next_steps: Immunohistochemical staining for CD68, CD163, CD1a, and Langerin on tibial biopsy
BRAF V600E mutation testing via allele-specific PCR or NGS on biopsy tissue
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Serum IgG subclass measurement and serum free light chain assay
Consultation with Hematology-Oncology regarding systemic therapy (e.g., BRAF/MEK inhibitors)
Long-bone skeletal survey and cardiac assessment (ECHO/cardiac MRI) to exclude typical ECD organ involvement
